# muscal

`muscal` is an R package for multiblock and matrix-based multivariate
analysis. It focuses on methods for integrating several tables measured
on the same observations, linked designs with partial overlap, and
repeated covariance/connectivity matrices.

The package includes classical “French school” methods such as Multiple
Factor Analysis (MFA) and STATIS-style workflows, along with newer
extensions for adaptive weighting, regularization, and repeated-matrix
modeling. Most fitted objects work naturally with the `multivarious`
ecosystem for scoring, projection, and preprocessing.

## What to use when

- [`mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/mfa.md) for
  several data blocks measured on the same observations.
- [`ipca()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/ipca.md) when
  you want adaptive block weighting instead of fixed MFA normalization.
- [`penalized_mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/penalized_mfa.md)
  when you want MFA with loading-similarity penalties.
- [`anchored_mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/linked_mfa.md)
  for linked blocks that map back to a reference table but do not share
  identical rows.
- [`aligned_mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/aligned_mfa.md)
  and
  [`aligned_mcca()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/aligned_mcca.md)
  for aligned multiblock integration and correlation analysis.
- [`covstatis()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/covstatis.md)
  for lists of covariance or connectivity matrices.
- [`bada()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bada.md) and
  [`bamfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bamfa.md)
  for barycentric and discriminant variants.
- [`bilinear_mixed()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bilinear_mixed.md)
  for repeated connectivity matrices with subject- and design-level
  structure.

## Installation

Install the package from r-universe:

``` r
install.packages(
  "muscal",
  repos = c("https://bbuchsbaum.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org")
)
```

Or install the current GitHub version with `pak`:

``` r
install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("bbuchsbaum/muscal")
```

## Quick start

``` r
library(muscal)

sim <- synthetic_multiblock(
  S = 4,
  n = 60,
  p = c(20, 30, 15, 25),
  r = 3,
  sigma = 0.3,
  seed = 42
)

fit <- mfa(sim$data_list, ncomp = 3)

dim(multivarious::scores(fit))
#> [1] 60  3

plot_variance(fit, type = "bar")
ggplot2::autoplot(fit)
```

That example covers the most common case: several feature blocks
measured on the same subjects. If your data are linked across uneven row
sets, covariance matrices, or repeated connectivity observations, jump
to the method-specific articles below.

## Where to start

- Package site: <https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/>
- Package overview:
  [docs/index.md](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/docs/index.md)
- Articles index:
  [docs/articles/index.md](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/docs/articles/index.md)
- Reference index:
  [docs/reference/index.md](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/docs/reference/index.md)
- MFA article:
  [docs/articles/mfa.md](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/docs/articles/mfa.md)
- MCCA intro:
  [vignettes/mcca.Rmd](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/vignettes/mcca.Rmd)
- Integrative PCA article:
  [docs/articles/ipca.md](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/docs/articles/ipca.md)
- Anchored MFA article:
  [docs/articles/linked_mfa.md](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/docs/articles/linked_mfa.md)
- Aligned MFA intro:
  [vignettes/aligned_mfa.Rmd](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/vignettes/aligned_mfa.Rmd)
- Aligned MCCA intro:
  [vignettes/aligned_mcca.Rmd](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/vignettes/aligned_mcca.Rmd)
- COVSTATIS article:
  [docs/articles/covstatis.md](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/docs/articles/covstatis.md)
- BaDA intro:
  [vignettes/bada.Rmd](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/vignettes/bada.Rmd)
- Bilinear mixed-model article:
  [docs/articles/bilinear_mixed.md](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/docs/articles/bilinear_mixed.md)

## Package scope

Beyond the core factor methods, `muscal` also includes helpers for
simulation
([`synthetic_multiblock()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/synthetic_multiblock.md)),
component estimation
([`estimate_components()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/estimate_components.md),
[`significant_components()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/significant_components.md)),
projection of new data, and a fairly broad set of plotting helpers for
scores, loadings, block weights, partial scores, convergence traces, and
coverage diagnostics.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`aligned_mcca()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/aligned_mcca.md)
  : Aligned Multiblock Canonical Correlation Analysis (Aligned MCCA)
- [`aligned_mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/aligned_mfa.md)
  : Aligned Multiple Factor Analysis (Aligned MFA)
- [`anchored_mcca()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/anchored_mcca.md)
  : Anchored Multiblock Canonical Correlation Analysis (Anchored MCCA)
- [`autoplot(`*`<bada>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/autoplot.bada.md)
  : Autoplot for BaDA
- [`autoplot(`*`<bamfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/autoplot.bamfa.md)
  : Autoplot for BaMFA
- [`autoplot(`*`<covstatis>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/autoplot.covstatis.md)
  : Autoplot for COVSTATIS
- [`autoplot(`*`<linked_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/autoplot.linked_mfa.md)
  : Autoplot for Linked MFA
- [`autoplot(`*`<mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/autoplot.mfa.md)
  : Autoplot for MFA
- [`autoplot(`*`<penalized_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/autoplot.penalized_mfa.md)
  : Autoplot for Penalized MFA
- [`bada()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bada.md)
  [`bootstrap(`*`<bada>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bada.md)
  [`reprocess(`*`<bada>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bada.md)
  [`project(`*`<bada>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bada.md)
  : Barycentric Discriminant Analysis (generic)
- [`bamfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bamfa.md) :
  Barycentric Multiple Factor Analysis (BaMFA)
- [`bilinear_mixed()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bilinear_mixed.md)
  : Bilinear Repeated-Measures Mixed Model
- [`bilinear_mixed_easy()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bilinear_mixed_easy.md)
  : Easy Front-End for Bilinear Mixed
- [`bilinear_mixed_recommend()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bilinear_mixed_recommend.md)
  : Recommend Practical Defaults for Bilinear Mixed
- [`bilinear_mixed_tune()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/bilinear_mixed_tune.md)
  : Tune Bilinear Mixed Hyperparameters via Subject-Block CV
- [`check_duality()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/check_duality.md)
  : Verify duality between ROI- and RV-space coordinates
- [`covstatis()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/covstatis.md)
  : STATIS for Covariance Matrices (generic)
- [`cv_muscal()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/cv_muscal.md)
  : Cross-Validate Muscal Models with Multidesign Folds
- [`default_metrics()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/default_metrics.md)
  : Default Metrics for a Muscal Task
- [`estimate_components()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/estimate_components.md)
  [`loading_reliability()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/estimate_components.md)
  : Estimate the number of components and loading reliability (shared
  helpers)
- [`graph_anchored_mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/graph_anchored_mfa.md)
  : Graph-Anchored Multiple Factor Analysis
- [`infer_muscal()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/infer_muscal.md)
  : Standard Resampling and Inference for Muscal Fits
- [`ipca()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/ipca.md) :
  Integrated Principal Components Analysis (generic)
- [`ipca_tune_alpha()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/ipca_tune_alpha.md)
  : Tune Tied Penalties for iPCA via 1D Alpha Search
- [`anchored_mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/linked_mfa.md)
  [`linked_mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/linked_mfa.md)
  : Anchored Multiple Factor Analysis (Anchored MFA)
- [`mcca()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/mcca.md) :
  Multiblock Canonical Correlation Analysis (generic)
- [`metric_registry()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/metric_registry.md)
  : Metric Registry for Muscal Tasks
- [`mfa-plots`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/mfa-plots.md)
  : Plotting Functions for MFA and Linked MFA
- [`mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/mfa.md) :
  Multiple Factor Analysis (generic)
- [`penalized_mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/penalized_mfa.md)
  : Penalized Multiple Factor Analysis (MFA)
- [`penalized_mfa_clusterwise()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/penalized_mfa_clusterwise.md)
  [`pmfa_cluster()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/penalized_mfa_clusterwise.md)
  : Penalized MFA with Clusterwise Spatial Smoothness Constraints
- [`performance_metrics()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/performance_metrics.md)
  : Compute Task-Aware Performance Metrics
- [`plot(`*`<bada>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot.bada.md)
  : Plot BaDA Results
- [`plot(`*`<bamfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot.bamfa.md)
  : Plot BaMFA Results
- [`plot(`*`<covstatis>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot.covstatis.md)
  : Plot COVSTATIS Results
- [`plot(`*`<linked_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot.linked_mfa.md)
  : Plot Linked MFA Scores
- [`plot(`*`<mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot.mfa.md)
  : Plot MFA Scores
- [`plot(`*`<penalized_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot.penalized_mfa.md)
  : Plot Penalized MFA Results
- [`plot_barycenters()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_barycenters.md)
  : Plot Class Barycenters for BaDA
- [`plot_block_fit()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_block_fit.md)
  : Plot Block Reconstruction Error
- [`plot_block_similarity()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_block_similarity.md)
  : Plot Block Similarity Matrix
- [`plot_block_weights()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_block_weights.md)
  : Plot Block Weights
- [`plot_convergence()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_convergence.md)
  : Plot Convergence Trace
- [`plot_coverage()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_coverage.md)
  : Plot Block Coverage Map
- [`plot_feature_groups()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_feature_groups.md)
  : Plot Feature Group Loadings
- [`plot_global_local()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_global_local.md)
  : Plot Global vs Local Decomposition for BaMFA
- [`plot_loading_alignment()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_loading_alignment.md)
  : Plot Loading Alignment for Penalized MFA
- [`plot_loadings()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_loadings.md)
  : Plot Variable Loadings
- [`plot_partial_scores()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_partial_scores.md)
  : Plot Partial Factor Scores
- [`plot_subjects()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_subjects.md)
  : Plot subject clouds in RV and ROI spaces
- [`plot_variance()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_variance.md)
  [`plot_variance.covstatis()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_variance.md)
  [`plot_variance.bada()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_variance.md)
  [`plot_variance.penalized_mfa()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/plot_variance.md)
  : Plot Variance Explained (Scree Plot)
- [`predict(`*`<aligned_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/predict.aligned_mfa.md)
  : Predict from an Aligned MFA Fit
- [`predict(`*`<anchored_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/predict.anchored_mfa.md)
  : Predict from an Anchored MFA Fit
- [`predict(`*`<bamfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/predict.bamfa.md)
  : Predict method for BaMFA objects
- [`predict(`*`<graph_anchored_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/predict.graph_anchored_mfa.md)
  : Predict from a Graph-Anchored MFA Fit
- [`predict(`*`<mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/predict.mfa.md)
  : Predict from a Multiple Factor Analysis Fit
- [`print(`*`<bamfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/print.bamfa.md)
  : Print Method for BaMFA Objects
- [`print(`*`<penalized_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/print.penalized_mfa.md)
  : Print Method for Penalized MFA Objects
- [`print(`*`<penalized_mfa_clusterwise>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/print.penalized_mfa_clusterwise.md)
  : Print Method for Penalized MFA Clusterwise Objects
- [`project()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/project.md)
  [`reprocess()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/project.md)
  : Re‑export selected generics from \*\*multivarious\*\*
- [`project(`*`<aligned_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/project.aligned_mfa.md)
  : Project New Rows into an Aligned MFA Space
- [`project(`*`<anchored_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/project.anchored_mfa.md)
  : Project New Rows into an Anchored MFA Space
- [`project(`*`<graph_anchored_mfa>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/project.graph_anchored_mfa.md)
  : Project New Rows into a Graph-Anchored MFA Space
- [`project_cov()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/project_cov.md)
  : Project a Covariance Matrix (generic)
- [`project_covariate()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/project_covariate.md)
  : Project a Subject-Level Covariate (generic)
- [`project_subjects()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/project_subjects.md)
  : Project and Summarize New Subject Data (generic)
- [`reconstruct(`*`<covstatis>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/reconstruct.covstatis.md)
  : Low-rank reconstruction of the compromise matrix
- [`roi_map()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/roi_map.md)
  : Extract ROI map for a compromise dimension
- [`significant_components()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/significant_components.md)
  : Identify Significant Components via RMT and Inter-block Coherence
  Tests
- [`synthetic_multiblock()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/reference/synthetic_multiblock.md)
  : Generate synthetic multiblock data

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Aligned Multiblock Canonical Correlation
  Analysis](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/aligned_mcca.md):
- [Aligned Multiple Factor
  Analysis](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/aligned_mfa.md):
- [Barycentric Discriminant
  Analysis](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/bada.md):
- [Barycentric MFA
  (BaMFA)](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/bamfa.md):
- [Bilinear Mixed Models for Repeated Connectivity
  Matrices](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/bilinear_mixed.md):
- [COVSTATIS
  Analysis](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/covstatis.md):
- [Integrative PCA
  (iPCA)](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/ipca.md):
- [Anchored Multiple Factor
  Analysis](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/linked_mfa.md):
- [Multiblock Canonical Correlation
  Analysis](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/mcca.md):
- [Multiple Factor
  Analysis](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/mfa.md):
- [Penalized Multiple Factor
  Analysis](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/muscal/articles/penalized_mfa.md):
